title: Wait n Bleed | PvP Ready!
description: Minecraft Texture Pack for crystal pvp
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nXhR8RMgZ3g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Wait n bleed**


## What does the pack adds?

> Small Utilities [ *Small Shield, Small Totem Item and Totem Pop, Small Potions, XP Bottles, and gaps* ]

> Shorter Sword

> Unobtrusive Tweaks [ *Small and translucent particles, Small neon fire, Quiter Enviroment* ]

> Custom blocks [Respawn Anchors, Obby, Glowstone, Grass(Small performance boost, not to much) ]

> Fancy Glint [From Here By *"archon_andromeda"* ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-glint) 🤙


### [Video Showcase](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qpYXNdy8-FU)
